zh.Wales-Hereford, England: 英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾威爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當King Tudor Trevor of Hereford於0900年出生在威爾士丹比爾時，他的父親Ynyr ap Cadfarch31歲，母親Rheingar ferch Lluddoca20歲。他於0931年與Angharad ferch Hywel在威爾士丹比爾丹比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於0948年在威爾士丹比爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.Wales-Hereford, England: 英国英格兰素斯 越可爾威爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Tudor Trevor of Hereford于0900年出生在威尔士丹比爾时，他的父亲Ynyr ap Cadfarch31岁，母亲Rheingar ferch Lluddoca20岁。他于0931年与Angharad ferch Hywel在威尔士丹比爾丹比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于0948年在威尔士丹比爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Hereford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hertford (Hertfordshire) (in which the t was lost early, as in the modern pronunciation Harford), Hereford (Herefordshire), or Harford (Devon, Gloucestershire). The Devon and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English here ‘army’ + ford ‘ford’, while the Gloucestershire and Hertfordshire placenames derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + ford.

variants.name: Herford
meanings: English: variant of   Hereford  .
German: variant of   Herfurth  .
German: habitational name from a place of that name in Westphalia.

variants.name: Heryford
meanings: Altered form of English   Hereford  .

variants.name: Heriford
meanings: Altered form of English   Hereford  .

variants.name: Harford
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Hereford  .

variants.name: Havard
meanings: English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): habitational name from Haverfordwest (Pembrokeshire), from Old English hæfer ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’.
English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): in some cases, the name may also be a variant of   Hereford  .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hahward, composed of the elements hah, which is unexplained, and ward ‘guard’.

variants.name: Hurford
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hereford  .

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

nameMeanings.name: Trevor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Welsh surname, in origin a local name from any of the many places in Wales called Trefor, from tref ‘settlement’ + fôr, mutated form of mawr ‘large’. In the mid-20th century it came to enjoy considerable popularity in the English-speaking world among people with no connection with Wales; for example the actor Trevor Howard ( 1916–88 ) was born in Kent.

en.lifeSummary: When King Tudor Trevor of Hereford was born in 0900, in Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Ynyr ap Cadfarch, was 31 and his mother, Rheingar ferch Lluddoca, was 20. He married Angharad ferch Hywel in 0931, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 0948, in Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Tudor Trevor of Hereford est né en 0900, à Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Ynyr ap Cadfarch, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Rheingar ferch Lluddoca, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Angharad ferch Hywel en 0931, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 0948, à Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Wales-Hereford, England: Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als King Tudor Trevor of Hereford 0900 in Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ynyr ap Cadfarch 31 und seine Mutter Rheingar ferch Lluddoca 20. Er hat 0931 in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales Angharad ferch Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 0948 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales.

Lui sposato Angharad ferch Hywel nel 0931, nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 0948, nel Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Tudor Trevor of Herefordが0900年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ynyr ap Cadfarchは31歳，母Rheingar ferch Lluddocaは20歳であった。0931年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグでAngharad ferch Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は0948年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Tudor Trevor of Hereford(이)가 0900년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ynyr ap Cadfarch(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Rheingar ferch Lluddoca(은)는 20세였다. 그는 0931년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 Angharad ferch Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0948년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Tudor Trevor of Hereford родился в 0900 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ynyr ap Cadfarch было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Rheingar ferch Lluddoca, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad ferch Hywel в 0931 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 0948 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 48 лет.
